use_cases: Displaying article or post previews with metadata in a dark-themed interface
Showcasing featured content items with progress indicators
Creating cohesive card layouts in SaaS dashboards
Presenting user-generated content with author and date information
Building card-based news feeds in media applications
ai_summary: The Bauhaus Card is a dark-themed card component featuring a rotating gradient border, glass-morphism styling, and CSS variable theming for customization. It includes a header with date and action buttons, a body section for title and description, and a progress indicator. Built as a composite component, it's designed for displaying content items like articles or posts in SaaS and media applications, with responsive behavior across desktop and mobile platforms.
